text.message: We're going to have super strong position with 3 ports here
Y'all really miss reading the board if you think I'm the Rob
You get road probably. Think it’s fair
You think I can hold Road long-term versus blue?
More wood and brick and mostly more space
So I'm going to build a road around the desert to get seven points and second place?
You just blocked the ore I cant trade it if i dont have it
I don't care to trade with you black. I'm trying to work with red
